entry.data:
MOSTLY CLEAR THIS EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS AROUND 60
SOUTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 70S
NORTHWEST WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH

CLEAR
LOWS IN THE UPPER 40S
NORTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 70S
EAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE MID 50S
SOUTHEAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE MORNING
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE UPPER 60S

MOSTLY SUNNY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 80S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE UPPER 60S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 80S

MOSTLY CLEAR IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S

MOSTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS AROUND 90
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING
SHOWERS LIKELY
LOWS IN THE UPPER 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 60 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY IN THE MORNING
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE MORNING, THEN SHOWERS LIKELY IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT
